scope_note: QA Mutation Game Root Lattice Cert family [244]: packages Wildberger's integer-only Mutation Game on the E_8 root lattice, with E_8 Dynkin adjacency, Cartan determinant 1, 240-root orbit closure, sign split 120+120, and Weyl involution/braid checks. Source: Wildberger, The Mutation Game, Coxeter–Dynkin Graphs, and Generalized Root Systems, Algebra Colloquium 27 (2020), pp. 10-11; theory note docs/theory/QA_MUTATION_GAME_ROOT_LATTICE.md; checks MGR_1+CARTAN_DEFN/BFS_240/ROOT_NORM/SIGN_SPLIT/INVOLUTION_BRAID/SRC/WITNESS/F; 1 PASS + 1 FAIL; self-test ok
